# Bug Template

```markdown
## Description
> Clear description of what's broken

## Steps to Reproduce
1.
2.
3.

## Expected vs. Actual Behavior
> What should happen vs. what actually happens

## Impact
> How this affects users (High/Medium/Low)

## Environment
> Where this occurs (browser, device, production/staging)

## Additional Context
> Screenshots, logs, or other helpful information
```
